revision.comment: changed category to [[:Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]]
revision.text: {{if empty|{{{1|2022}}}|{{color|red|Date parameter missing! ([[Template:BCE]])}}}} {{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{link|}}}}}|yes|[[Common Era|BCE]]|BCE}} {{Documentation | content = A convenience{{\}}consistency template for the display of [[Common Era|Before Common Era]] years that places the abbreviation "BCE" preceded by a [[non-breaking space]] ( ) before a year supplied. If the {{para|link}} parameter supplied is "y", "yes", or "true", the "BCE" is rendered as a link to the "Common Era" article (to which "Before Common Era" and "BCE" redirect). ===Examples=== : {{BCE|598}} produces: {{BCE|598}} : {{BCE|5189|link=y}} produces: {{BCE|5189|link=y}} : {{BCE}} produces: {{BCE}} ===See also=== * {{tl|CE}}, a similar template for Common Era years. * {{tl|sBCE}}, a template to be placed after the year, with no parameters [[Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]] }}

{{if empty|{{{1|2022}}}|{{color|red|Date parameter missing! ([[Template:BCE]])}}}} {{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{link|}}}}}|yes|[[Common Era|BCE]]|BCE}} {{Documentation | content = A convenience{{\}}consistency template for the display of [[Common Era|Before Common Era]] years that places the abbreviation "BCE" preceded by a [[non-breaking space]] ( ) before a year supplied. If the {{para|link}} parameter supplied is "y", "yes", or "true", the "BCE" is rendered as a link to the "Common Era" article (to which "Before Common Era" and "BCE" redirect). ===Examples=== : {{BCE|598}} produces: {{BCE|598}} : {{BCE|5189|link=y}} produces: {{BCE|5189|link=y}} : {{BCE}} produces: {{BCE}} ===See also=== * {{tl|CE}}, a similar template for Common Era years. * {{tl|sBCE}}, a template to be placed after the year, with no parameters [[Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Time and date abbreviation templates]]
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{if empty|{{{1|2022 [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{color|red|Date parameter missing! ([[Template:BCE]])}}}} {{#ifeq:{{yesno|{{{link|}}}}}|yes|[[:en:Common Era|BCE]]|BCE}} {{Documentation | content = A convenience{{\}}consistency template for the display of [[:en:Common Era|Before Common Era]] years that places the abbreviation "BCE" preceded by a [[:en:Non-breaking space|Non-breaking space]] ( ) before a year supplied. If the {{para|link}} parameter supplied is "y", "yes", or "true", the "BCE" is rendered as a link to the "Common Era" article (to which "Before Common Era" and "BCE" redirect). ===Examples=== : {{BCE|598}} produces: {{BCE|598}} : {{BCE|5189|link=y}} produces: {{BCE|5189|link=y}} : {{BCE}} produces: {{BCE}} ===See also=== * {{tl|CE}}, a similar template for Common Era years. * {{tl|sBCE}}, a template to be placed after the year, with no parameters }}
